tasks.litellm:stop: docker stop litellm-proxy && docker rm litellm-proxy
tasks.google-mcp:stop: docker stop google-workspace-mcp && docker rm google-workspace-mcp
tasks.dev: deno task sync:svelte && LINK_DEV_MODE=true DEV_MODE=true deno run -A npm:concurrently -n daemon,link,ledger,web -c blue,green,yellow,magenta 'deno task atlas:dev daemon start' 'cd apps/link && deno task dev' 'cd apps/ledger && deno task dev' 'cd apps/web-client && vite dev'
tasks.dev:playground: LINK_DEV_MODE=true DEV_MODE=true deno run -A npm:concurrently -n daemon,link,ledger,playground,tunnel -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan 'deno task atlas:dev daemon start' 'cd apps/link && deno task dev' 'cd apps/ledger && deno task dev' 'deno task playground' 'deno task webhook-tunnel'
tasks.dev:full: deno task sync:svelte && LINK_DEV_MODE=true DEV_MODE=true FRIDAY_GATEWAY_URL=http://localhost:8087 deno run -A npm:concurrently -n daemon,link,ledger,web,gateway,bounce,signal -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,white,cyan,red 'deno task atlas:dev daemon start' 'cd apps/link && deno task dev' 'cd apps/ledger && deno task dev' 'cd apps/web-client && npx vite dev' 'PORT=8087 DOT_ENV=$HOME/.atlas/gateway.env go run ./apps/gateway' 'PORT=8083 METRICS_PORT=9091 DOT_ENV=$HOME/.atlas/bounce.env go run ./apps/bounce' 'test -f $HOME/.atlas/signal-gateway.env && PORT=8081 METRICS_PORT=9092 DOT_ENV=$HOME/.atlas/signal-gateway.env go run ./apps/signal-gateway || echo signal-gateway skipped - create ~/.atlas/signal-gateway.env to enable'
tasks.test: OTEL_DENO=true CORTEX_TEST=true DENO_TESTING=true LINK_DEV_MODE=true DEV_MODE=true vitest run
tasks.fmt: deno run -A npm:@biomejs/biome format --write && deno task -f '@atlas/web-client' fmt && deno task -f '@atlas/auth-ui' fmt
tasks.fmt:check: deno run -A npm:@biomejs/biome format && deno task -f '@atlas/web-client' fmt:check && deno task -f '@atlas/auth-ui' fmt:check
tasks.lint: deno lint --fix && deno run -A npm:@biomejs/biome check --write
tasks.lint:check: deno lint && deno run -A npm:@biomejs/biome check --max-diagnostics=200
tasks.sync:svelte: deno task -f @atlas/ui sync && deno task -f @atlas/agent-playground sync && deno task -f @atlas/web-client sync
tasks.playground: deno task sync:svelte && deno run -A npm:concurrently -n playground,pty -c magenta,cyan 'cd tools/agent-playground && npx vite dev' 'deno task -f @atlas/pty-server start'
